points.text: Wear a face mask in public and when sharing indoor spaces with others. [doc1_covid19.txt:chunk_00006]
Maintain physical or social distancing of at least 1‑2 meters from people not in your household. [doc1_covid19.txt:chunk_00006]
Keep indoor environments well ventilated by opening windows or using air filtration. [doc1_covid19.txt:chunk_00006]
Wash hands frequently with soap and water for at least 20 seconds. [doc1_covid19.txt:chunk_00094]
Avoid touching your eyes, nose, or mouth with unwashed hands. [doc1_covid19.txt:chunk_00006]
Stay home if you feel ill or suspect infection; seek medical care only when needed. [doc1_covid19.txt:chunk_00094]
Cover coughs and sneezes with a tissue or the inside of your elbow. [doc1_covid19.txt:chunk_00094]
Do not share personal household items such as utensils, towels, or phones. [doc1_covid19.txt:chunk_00094]
Get vaccinated against COVID‑19 to lower risk of infection and severe disease. [doc1_covid19.txt:chunk_00006]
Maintain good indoor airflow to dilute viral particles. [doc2_covid19.txt:chunk_00001]
Keep physical distance from others, especially in crowded indoor spaces. [doc2_covid19.txt:chunk_00001]
Wear a mask in settings where COVID-19 transmission risk is high. [doc2_covid19.txt:chunk_00001]
Practice frequent hand washing with soap for at least 20 seconds. [doc2_covid19.txt:chunk_00023]
Use alcohol-based hand sanitizer (≥60% alcohol) when soap isn’t available. [doc2_covid19.txt:chunk_00023]
Cover coughs and sneezes with a tissue or your elbow, then wash hands. [doc2_covid19.txt:chunk_00023]
Avoid close contact with anyone who is sick or showing COVID-19 symptoms. [doc2_covid19.txt:chunk_00022]
Limit time spent in poorly ventilated indoor areas with many people. [doc2_covid19.txt:chunk_00011]
Stay home if you feel ill or have been exposed to COVID-19. [doc2_covid19.txt:chunk_00022]
Follow vaccination recommendations to further lower infection risk. [doc2_covid19.txt:chunk_00001]
Avoid crowded places and poorly ventilated indoor spaces. [doc3_covid19.txt:chunk_00016]
Keep at least 1 metre distance from others in public. [doc3_covid19.txt:chunk_00016]
Wear a mask in public where community transmission is present or distancing is not possible. [doc3_covid19.txt:chunk_00016]
Wash hands frequently with soap and water or use an alcohol‑based hand rub. [doc3_covid19.txt:chunk_00016]
Ensure indoor areas are well ventilated. [doc3_covid19.txt:chunk_00016]
Get vaccinated and continue other measures like distancing and hand hygiene. [doc3_covid19.txt:chunk_00012]
